products.name: VANISH HEX JAR
products.description: Some people need a door closed, not a conversation. The Vanish Hex Jar is for the ones who won't take the hint — cord-cutting, energy-clearing, and gone-for-good in one sealed jar. Shake, set on the windowsill, and let them become someone else's problem.
ingredients: Dried bay leaf (write the person's initial on it, then burn the edges before adding)
Black thread, cut into pieces (symbolizing severed connection)
Small piece of obsidian or black tourmaline

products.name: NO CONTACT SACHET
products.description: Carry it, hang it by the door, or tuck it in a drawer they'll never open. The No Contact Sachet keeps your space — and your peace — exactly that: yours.
ingredients: Asafoetida (traditionally used in banishing work — small amount, sealed sachet)
Black ribbon to tie the sachet closed

products.name: IRON SPINE CANDLE RITUAL
products.description: You already know what you need to say. The Iron Spine Ritual just makes sure your voice doesn't shake when you say it. Light it before the meeting, the call, the conversation you've rehearsed a hundred times — and walk in standing taller.
ingredients: A small steel pin or nail ("iron spine")
Orange or red candle (sold separately or as a kit add-on)

products.name: LAST WORD OIL
products.description: A drop on the wrist, a drop at the throat. Last Word Oil isn't for picking the fight — it's for finishing it, calmly, on your terms.

products.name: SELF-BINDING SACHET
products.description: Not every battle is with someone else. The Self-Binding Sachet quiets the voice in your head that talks you out of things you already decided to do.
ingredients: Bay leaf (confidence, written affirmation folded inside)
Black thread (binding — wrapped around the sachet itself)

products.name: COMEUPPANCE POPPET KIT
products.description: Karma's a little slow sometimes. The Comeuppance Kit gives it a nudge. A hand-stitched poppet, pins, and a ritual that says what you've been thinking: what goes around, comes around — for ritual & entertainment purposes.
ingredients: Card insert: "For ritual and entertainment purposes. This kit channels symbolic justice — what is sent returns to its source."

products.name: MIRROR CURSE JAR
products.description: Whatever they sent your way doesn't have to land. The Mirror Curse Jar reflects it straight back — for ritual & entertainment purposes — so you can stop carrying what was never yours.
ingredients: Small mirror shard or mirror chip (face-out)

products.name: PETTY REVENGE CANDLE
products.description: For the small stuff. The Petty Revenge Candle is for the group chat drama, the bad coworker, the friend who never pays you back — light it, laugh about it, let it go. For ritual & entertainment purposes only.
ingredients: A tiny scrap of paper with their name, folded and tucked under the wax (sold as a ritual prompt, not instructions for harm)

products.name: ROOT CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: Feeling untethered? The Root Chakra Jar brings you back into your body — grounded, steady, planted.

products.name: SACRAL CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: For the creative block, the emotional numbness, the "I don't even know what I want" feeling. The Sacral Jar stirs it all back to life.

products.name: SOLAR PLEXUS CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: Your gut feeling has been right more often than you've given it credit for. The Solar Plexus Jar reconnects you to it.

products.name: HEART CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: Whether it's love for someone else or love you've stopped giving yourself — the Heart Chakra Jar reopens what's been closed off.

products.name: THROAT CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: For everything you've swallowed instead of said. The Throat Chakra Jar clears the block between what you feel and what comes out of your mouth.

products.name: THIRD EYE CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: For the gut feelings you've been ignoring and the patterns you keep almost seeing. The Third Eye Jar sharpens the signal.

products.name: CROWN CHAKRA CLEANSE JAR
products.description: For the moments you feel disconnected from everything bigger than the to-do list. The Crown Jar reopens the line.

products.name: BLACK SALT
products.description: Every banishing jar on this shelf starts here. Black Salt is the line you draw when "please stop" didn't work — sprinkle it on a threshold, ring a windowsill, or seal it into your own jar. Sold by the jar, restocked when you run out (you will run out).
ingredients: Activated charcoal or burnt herb ash (traditional blackening agent)

products.name: WHITE SAGE
products.description: Clear the air — literally. White Sage is for the "something feels off in here" moments: after the breakup, after the argument, after the houseguest leaves. Light it, let the smoke move through the room, and start the next chapter without yesterday's static still hanging around.
ingredients: Dried white sage bundle (smudge stick) or loose leaf
Optional: bound with cotton string, occasionally accented with lavender

products.name: LOOSE INCENSE BLENDS
products.description: One pinch on a charcoal disc, and the room changes. Loose Incense Blends are matched to every jar in the shop — burn the one that matches your intention, or mix your own. No two batches smell quite the same, and that's the point.
ingredients: Banish Blend: rue, clove, dried bay, black peppercorn
Confidence Blend: rosemary, cinnamon, orange peel
Justice/Return Blend: black pepper, dried chili, clove
Third Eye Blend: mugwort, star anise, lavender
Heart Blend: rose petal, lavender, green tea leaf

products.name: BREAKUP RITUAL BOX
products.description: You don't need closure from them. You can give it to yourself. The Breakup Ritual Box has everything for one clean night: cut the cord, salt the door, light the candle, and wake up tomorrow with your name back in your own mouth.
ingredients: Printed ritual card with step-by-step instructions

products.name: RITUAL CANDLES
products.description: Unscented, hand-poured, and exactly what every jar in this shop is waiting to be lit next to. Pick the color that matches your intention — or just grab black, it goes with everything.

products.name: "WITCH" TEE
products.description: Streamer culture meets the occult. Original witch-streaming-themed wordmark — its own typography and color identity that reads as witchy + internet culture. Wear your craft.
